name: SCHOOL_TRANSACTIONS
description: Manage manual double-entry transaction journals with draft/post workflow.

name: SCHOOL
description: This is the command centre of the school features.

name: SCHOOL_HOLIDAYS
description: To manage the holidays at school to manage the schedule of students and teachers.

name: SCHOOL_ACCOUNTS
description: Manage school chart of accounts and account hierarchy.

name: SCHOOL_TRANSACTION_TEMPLATES
description: Manage reusable school transaction and fee definition templates.

name: SCHOOL_PAY_RATES
description: Manage pay rate profiles used for teacher and staff compensation.

name: SCHOOL_PROGRAMS
description: Manage academic programs and their registration configuration.

name: SCHOOL_STAFF
description: Manage school staff records and administrative assignments.

name: SCHOOL_STUDENTS
description: Manage student profiles, enrollment identity, and school status.

name: SCHOOL_TEACHERS
description: Manage teacher profiles, teaching assignments, and employment data.

name: SCHOOL_SESSIONS
description: To manages sessions

name: SCHOOL_CLASSES
description: Add or edit classes and managing the class feature

name: SCHOOL_SAMPLE_DATA
description: Generate sample students, teachers, and staff for testing school workflows.

name: SCHOOL_TERMS
description: Define academic terms and semesters with lifecycle status and date windows for programs and class eligibility.

name: SCHOOL_ACADEMIC_LEDGER
description: Track academic registrations, term progression, class enrollment, scores, and final academic results.

name: SCHOOL_PROGRAM_REGISTRATIONS
description: Register students into programs, review registration records, and manage manual rollback actions.

name: SCHOOL_TERM_REGISTRATIONS
description: Register students into program terms, validate class baskets, and manage rollback of finance, academic, and roster side effects.

name: SCHOOL_TIMESHEET_PERIODS
description: Manage payroll period windows used by teacher and staff timesheets.

name: SCHOOL_TIMESHEETS
description: Review and submit teacher and staff timesheets, including controlled edits and approvals.

name: SCHOOL_SESSION_STATUSES
description: Define session statuses, formulas, and behavior rules used by schedules and timesheets.

name: SCHOOL_WITHDRAWAL
description: Manage student withdrawals from classes, terms, and programs with refund calculations and academic record updates.

name: SCHOOL_REPORTS
description: Design report templates, assign reports to sessions, and collect report submissions.

name: SCHOOL_CLASS_ENROLLMENT_PERIODS
description: Manage canonical class enrollment periods for rolling lifecycle.

name: SCHOOL_CLASS_CYCLES
description: Manage class cycle rollover and carry-forward lifecycle actions.

name: SCHOOL_EXAMS
description: Build, version, and manage exam/test templates, revisions, and question banks.

name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_TEMPLATE
description: Exam templates, revisions, question bank, publish, and revision copies.

name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_ALLOCATION
description: Exam allocations, assignment generation, student add/exempt, and allocation lifecycle.

name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_TAKING
description: Student take-exam flow: list assignments, attempts, save answers, submit.

name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_REVIEW
description: Teacher review: assignment queue, per-student status, grading and attempt cleanup.

name: SCHOOL_REPORTS_TEMPLATE
description: Manage report templates and DOCX mappings.

name: SCHOOL_REPORTS_ASSIGNMENT
description: Manage report assignments and target scope.

name: SCHOOL_REPORTS_INSTANCES
description: Manage report instances, edits, and exports.

name: SCHOOL_SUBJECTS
description: This is the section which allows you to create different subjects/courses.

name: SCHOOL_DEPARTMENTS
description: In this section we manage the departments of this school.

name: SCHOOL_ATTENDANCES
description: This section provide the management for attendance lists.

name: SCHOOL_GRADEBOOK
description: Session grades matrix: gradebooks, quizzes, assignments, and weighted final scores.

name: SCHOOL_SCHEDULES
description: Managing the schedules of teachers and students.
